# LauncherGroup enumeration

Which Full-mode section an entry sits in.

```csharp
public enum LauncherGroup
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Plugin | `0` | A tool plugin — large tile, pinnable (shows in Minimal when pinned). |
| Settings | `1` | A framework Settings panel — smaller tile, opens its panel; not pinned. |
